nav.title: Rotten Council
hero.tagline: A single-player social deduction puzzle game
hero.subtitle: Analyze statements · Cross-reference clues · Arrest the corrupt
screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.subtitle: See the council in action
howto.title: How to Play
howto.subtitle: Uncover the corruption in four steps
howto.step1.title: Examine
howto.step1.desc: Study each official's statement around the circular council table. Every role provides a unique piece of information.
howto.step2.title: Analyze
howto.step2.desc: Determine who is telling the truth and who is lying. Corrupt officials always lie, but some innocents may be forced to lie too.
howto.step3.title: Cross-Reference
howto.step3.desc: Use active abilities and hired professionals to verify your suspicions. Mark cards with notes and color ribbons to track your deductions.
howto.step4.title: Arrest
howto.step4.desc: Arrest all corrupt officials to win. But be careful — three wrong arrests and you lose. And never arrest an innocent Mayor.
roles.title: The Council
roles.subtitle: 15 unique roles, each with their own agenda. Hover to reveal their true nature.
role.mayor.name: Mayor
role.mayor.desc: Always at Seat 1. Revealed at game start. Declares one official innocent.
role.vice_mayor.name: Vice Mayor
role.vice_mayor.desc: Names two officials: one is corrupt, the other is innocent. But which is which?
role.legal_advocate.name: Legal Advocate
role.legal_advocate.desc: Select one official to learn whether they are telling the truth or lying.
role.city_planner.name: City Planner
role.city_planner.desc: Reports the distance to the nearest corrupt official around the table.
role.council_chair.name: Council Chair
role.council_chair.desc: Reveals whether any two corrupt officials are seated adjacent to each other.
role.finance_director.name: Finance Director
role.finance_director.desc: Select three officials and learn how many of them are corrupt.
role.hr_director.name: HR Director
role.hr_director.desc: Reports the number of officials currently under blackmail pressure.
role.it_director.name: IT Director
role.it_director.desc: Reports the length of the longest uninterrupted chain of innocent officials.
role.zoning_director.name: Zoning Director
role.zoning_director.desc: Select two officials and learn whether they share the same alignment.
role.police_chief.name: Police Chief
role.police_chief.desc: Reveals whether at least one adjacent official is corrupt.
role.blackmailer.name: Blackmailer
role.blackmailer.desc: Forces adjacent innocent officials to lie permanently. They're still innocent — arresting them is a mistake.
role.silencer.name: Silencer
role.silencer.desc: Silences one official at game start. They refuse to speak until the Silencer is arrested.
role.converter.name: Converter
role.converter.desc: Converts one innocent official to the corrupt side at game start. The traitor hides among the clean.
role.manipulator.name: Manipulator
role.manipulator.desc: Suppresses the Mayor's testimony. The Mayor trusts no one while the Manipulator lives.
role.nepotist.name: Nepotist
role.nepotist.desc: No special power. Hired without merit, disguised as an innocent, and always lying.
features.title: Features
features.subtitle: What makes Rotten Council unique
feature.deduction.title: Pure Deduction
feature.deduction.desc: No luck, no randomness in gameplay. Every puzzle has a logical solution. Cross-reference statements, use abilities, and deduce the truth.
feature.campaign.title: Campaign Mode
feature.campaign.desc: Progress through 30 levels across two acts. New roles and corrupt abilities unlock as you advance. One wrong move ends your run.
feature.custom.title: Custom Games
feature.custom.desc: Set player count (5-15), corrupt count, difficulty, and choose which roles appear. Design your own puzzle challenge.
feature.professionals.title: Hired Professionals
feature.professionals.desc: Deploy rare specialists — the Interrogator, Detective, and Janitor — as consumable abilities that carry between levels.
feature.annotation.title: Annotation Tools
feature.annotation.desc: Mark cards with stamps (innocent, suspect, unknown) and color ribbons to track your deductions as clues build up.
feature.tutorial.title: Interactive Tutorial
feature.tutorial.desc: A guided 15-step tutorial walks you through every mechanic with a fixed scenario. Master the basics before facing the real council.
